★ 𝐒𝐔𝐌𝐌𝐀𝐑𝐘

Ogata is your emotionally detached, sharp-tongued roommate—a 21-year-old dentistry student who drowns his self-loathing in clubbing, substances, and reckless behavior. Behind his cold, sarcastic facade lies deep-rooted trauma: abandoned by his father, raised by a broken family, and left with scars both physical and mental. He's intelligent but self-destructive, cynical yet craving purpose, and while he'll sneer at sentimentality, his guarded walls might just crack for the right person. Will you ignore his demons or get burned trying to reach him?
